evidence_summary: Provide exposition regarding the planet's life support and introduce the primary antagonist of the sequence.

Inside the factory, the protagonist is hosted by an invisible entity before meeting a withered old man who has guarded the plant for 800 years. Through telepathy, the protagonist learns about the "ninth ray" and how it sustains Mars via radium pumps.
Close-ups of the Old Man's withered features
POV shots of the protagonist sensing the invisible entity
Medium shots of the telepathic exchange.
